  "findings": [
    "More than 360 degrees of total bends between pull points in the EMT run."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Rework the conduit run to reduce the total degrees of bends to 360 degrees or less, or install an intermediate pull box."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC Section 358.26 limits the total sum of bends between pull points (e.g., conduit bodies and boxes) to a maximum of 360 degrees. Exceeding this limit makes wire pulling excessively difficult and risks damaging the conductor insulation.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 358.26"
  ]
}
